entity.summary: United States-based centralized cryptocurrency exchange and fintech platform offering crypto trading, cards, transfers, and related services.
entity.notes: The official platform remains live with exchange and trading access. CoinGecko identifies a 2020 establishment year and United States registration.

evidence.title: CoinZoom official platform website
evidence.notes: First-party site exposes active exchange, price, account, card, and transfer services.

evidence.title: CoinZoom exchange profile and markets
evidence.notes: Exchange profile identifies CoinZoom as a United States centralized exchange established in 2020 and reports current market activity.
